summary: Added a read-only doctor/--doctor envelope to repo-hygiene-check.sh and the install-template copy so the substrate-hygiene protocol can be inspected without cleanup or pruning side effects.

proof.summary: 8/0 for repo-local and template scripts: syntax, doctor pass envelope, --doctor alias, missing-repo fail envelope.
25/0; existing dispatch and daily-report wiring still passes after the doctor addition.
doctor_subcommand_status moved to basic; mutates_state=yes; ownership=own.

boundaries: Doctor mode does not run H-1..H-4 scans.
Doctor mode does not prune, delete, untrack, or clean files.
repo-hygiene-prune.sh remains the separate explicit cleanup surface.
Canonical CLI scoping remains separately classified as missing; this closeout is limited to doctor-mode gap reduction.
